text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I decide to wander around the offices
and get to know my fellow trainers a bit better.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You must understand that songs are not merely
words timed to music.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: There is meaning to both the lyrics and the music. While your voice is consistent...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: My songs lack feeling. Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, look at the time. We'll continue this
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'll think of a solution. Try to gain a deeper
understanding of the lyrics in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: All right. See you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I saw you there, but I had to wrap things up with
my runner first.
choice_data_list: Of course. Runners should always take priority.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm glad you're of the same opinion.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: So, what can I help you with?
choice_data_list: Would you like to grab a bite to eat together?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...I don't see why not. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting to eat at a karaoke
establishment.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But I think I understand why. You brought me
here because of my conversation with Little
Cocon earlier, correct?
choice_data_list:
I figured the best approach to solve a
song-related issue is by singing.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely. While it's impossible for me to run
like one of them...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I should be capable of singing. Of course, I'll need
an objective observer to judge my performance.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I hope you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Phew... How was I?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That's kind, but I feel I wasn't sustaining the notes
long enough.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: It seems I still need practice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
One should not rely solely on data when coming
up with a solution to a problem.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What Little Cocon requires in her singing is more
emotion. Practicing is the best way for her to
learn this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Now then, one more try!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Phew... I believe I held my notes well that time.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: So you say, but now I am the one whose singing lacks emotional depth.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's one thing to give instructions, but another to execute them well. I've still got a long ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon is awkward when it comes to her
feelings and has trouble expressing herself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That's why I must learn to sing with my heart and
serve as an example to her.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I need to show her that music has the power to
invoke emotions in others.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Are you prepared? I expect you to accompany me
until I can sing well enough to do so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her gentle, yet powerful, voice rises and falls, I
can tell from her song just how much she cares
about her racers.
